title: Space Magic
body:
![A banner with the text "space magic"](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6bdf5026833526bac3be01c5fb3782f9a2252444.png)

# 🌙 SPACE MAGIC 🪄
Welcome to this thrilling modpack where you can explore space while using magic! This modpack features Ad Astra and Iron's Spells 'n Spellbooks that and more mods that gives this modpack a space and magic theme!

## Space & Technology mods
This modpack has Ad Astra, along with Ad Astra Giselle Addon, providing a fully fledged space experience! In Ad Astra, you start by building rockets, go into space and then getting deeper and deeper in order to find better resources. The modpack also features Mekanism and Applied Energistics 2 which adds a lot of technology to the game.

## Magic
Another thing that this modpack has is magic. You can use spells and equipment from Iron's Spells 'n Spellbooks or use new enchantments and effects with Spells & Magic. Some of the other mods does also have magic aspects of them. Have fun with your magic!

## Other mods
As well as the space and magic mods, there's a number of other mods that improves terrain such as Regions Unexplored or Tectonic, a new dimension and new gear with Deeper And Darker and the Essential mod which allows you to easily play this modpack with your friends! If you have any issues with the pack, please contact @quelxy on discord!

![A white moon with white stars](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ccfa3d9612f0ec30734fb011cf1ea9cefa2444eb.png)
